verses.latin_vulgate: Bonum est confiteri Domino,  et psallere nomini tuo, Altissime :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ט֗וֹב לְהֹד֥וֹת לַיהֹוָ֑ה וּלְזַמֵּ֖ר לְשִׁמְךָ֣ עֶלְיֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: It is a good thing to give thanks unto the Lord, and to sing praises unto thy name, O most High:

verses.latin_vulgate: ad annuntiandum mane misericordiam tuam,  et veritatem tuam per noctem,
verses.king_james: To shew forth thy lovingkindness in the morning, and thy faithfulness every night,

verses.latin_vulgate: in decachordo, psalterio ;  cum cantico, in cithara.
verses.king_james: Upon an instrument of ten strings, and upon the psaltery; upon the harp with a solemn sound.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia delectasti me, Domine, in factura tua ;  et in operibus manuum tuarum exsultabo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י שִׂמַּחְתַּ֣נִי יְהֹוָ֣ה בְּפׇעֳלֶ֑ךָ בְּֽמַעֲשֵׂ֖י יָדֶ֣יךָ אֲרַנֵּֽן׃
verses.king_james: For thou, Lord, hast made me glad through thy work: I will triumph in the works of thy hands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quam magnificata sunt opera tua, Domine !  nimis profundæ factæ sunt cogitationes tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַה־גָּדְל֣וּ מַעֲשֶׂ֣יךָ יְהֹוָ֑ה מְ֝אֹ֗ד עָמְק֥וּ מַחְשְׁבֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: O Lord, how great are thy works! and thy thoughts are very deep.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vir insipiens non cognoscet,  et stultus non intelliget hæc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִֽישׁ־בַּ֭עַר לֹ֣א יֵדָ֑ע וּ֝כְסִ֗יל לֹא־יָבִ֥ין אֶת־זֹֽאת׃
verses.king_james: A brutish man knoweth not; neither doth a fool understand this.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum exorti fuerint peccatores sicut fœnum,  et apparuerint omnes qui operantur iniquitatem,  ut intereant in sæculum sæculi :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּפְרֹ֤חַ רְשָׁעִ֨ים ׀ כְּמ֥וֹ־עֵ֗שֶׂב וַ֭יָּצִיצוּ כׇּל־פֹּ֣עֲלֵי אָ֑וֶן לְהִשָּׁמְדָ֥ם עֲדֵי־עַֽד׃
verses.king_james: When the wicked spring as the grass, and when all the workers of iniquity do flourish; it is that they shall be destroyed for ever:

verses.latin_vulgate: tu autem Altissimus in æternum, Domine.
verses.king_james: But thou, Lord, art most high for evermore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam ecce inimici tui, Domine,  quoniam ecce inimici tui peribunt ;  et dispergentur omnes qui operantur iniquitatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י הִנֵּ֪ה אֹיְבֶ֡יךָ יְֽהֹוָ֗ה כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֣ה אֹיְבֶ֣יךָ יֹאבֵ֑דוּ יִ֝תְפָּרְד֗וּ כׇּל־פֹּ֥עֲלֵי אָֽוֶן׃
verses.king_james: For, lo, thine enemies, O Lord, for, lo, thine enemies shall perish; all the workers of iniquity shall be scattered.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et exaltabitur sicut unicornis cornu meum,  et senectus mea in misericordia uberi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתָּ֣רֶם כִּרְאֵ֣ים קַרְנִ֑י בַּ֝לֹּתִ֗י בְּשֶׁ֣מֶן רַעֲנָֽן׃
verses.king_james: But my horn shalt thou exalt like the horn of an unicorn: I shall be anointed with fresh oil.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et despexit oculus meus inimicos meos,  et in insurgentibus in me malignantibus audiet auris mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתַּבֵּ֥ט עֵינִ֗י בְּשׁ֫וּרָ֥י בַּקָּמִ֖ים עָלַ֥י מְרֵעִ֗ים תִּשְׁמַ֥עְנָה אׇזְנָֽי׃
verses.king_james: Mine eye also shall see my desire on mine enemies, and mine ears shall hear my desire of the wicked that rise up against me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justus ut palma florebit ;  sicut cedrus Libani multiplicabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צַ֭דִּיק כַּתָּמָ֣ר יִפְרָ֑ח כְּאֶ֖רֶז בַּלְּבָנ֣וֹן יִשְׂגֶּֽה׃
verses.king_james: The righteous shall flourish like the palm tree: he shall grow like a cedar in Lebanon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Plantati in domo Domini,  in atriis domus Dei nostri florebunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁ֭תוּלִים בְּבֵ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה בְּחַצְר֖וֹת אֱלֹהֵ֣ינוּ יַפְרִֽיחוּ׃
verses.king_james: Those that be planted in the house of the Lord shall flourish in the courts of our God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adhuc multiplicabuntur in senecta uberi,  et bene patientes erunt :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ע֭וֹד יְנוּב֣וּן בְּשֵׂיבָ֑ה דְּשֵׁנִ֖ים וְֽרַעֲנַנִּ֣ים יִהְיֽוּ׃
verses.king_james: They shall still bring forth fruit in old age; they shall be fat and flourishing;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut annuntient quoniam rectus Dominus Deus noster,  et non est iniquitas in eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְ֭הַגִּיד כִּֽי־יָשָׁ֣ר יְהֹוָ֑ה צ֝וּרִ֗י וְֽלֹא־[עַוְלָ֥תָה] (עלתה) בּֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: To shew that the Lord is upright: he is my rock, and there is no unrighteousness in him.
